title: 其實大家點睇自殺
remark:
本主題可能正在討論有關「自殺」的內容。
若你需要進一步協助，可致電以下求助熱線：
[url]https://lihkg.com/help/suicide-crisis-helpline[/url]

replies.msg:
近年成日都見到自殺嘅新聞，睇下睇下，個個自殺都有唔同原因，不過多數都係讀書同壓力，但係大家又點睇自殺呢?

利申：最撚憎係嗰D話自殺者無用or無勇氣嘅人，嗰D人連尊重，體諒死者都唔識，正撚樣
推
此回覆已被刪除

食咗抗抑鬱藥物可能更想自殺
醫生開藥前唔講清楚風險係好有問題
推上去

安樂死應該係十八歲成人嘅人權
經過專業評估同嚴謹程序
容許成年人合法安樂死

而家安樂死不合法
但一個人要死總有方法
結果影響到他人
特別係親屬朋友
如果安樂死程序合法化
仲可以俾佢哋同身邊嘅人適當地交代道別
而至親亦可以喺專業協助下盡佢哋最後努力挽救生命
當所有辦法用盡
就係喺成熟經妥善安排情況下訣別

原理同黃賭合法化一樣
經過理性程序
好過暗黑操作
天然呆唯
-1

一直都好想寫個相關既post
其實抑鬱自殺黎講我見過最好既比喻係類似你後面有把火一直追住你 你面前一係跳一係比火燒死

所以痛苦無法感同身受 但至少可以了解多啲
覺得自己無未來
大家有冇諗過會自殺

唔尊重生命
自殺者得唔到解脫

阻人自殺就係維穩不維權。
https://lih.kg/955378
- 分享自 LIHKG 討論區

唔俾人去死嘅原因就係要奴役人。
咁奴隸制度先得以持續。
自殺完都係會返返嚟

2019年香港自殺資料統計
https://s.siuyeong.com/2019HKsuicide

周圍環境真係好影響
係香港睇住個咁嘅政府同國家
福地? 做到成隻狗咁連狗糧都冇撚得食 仲話上車?

我都想重刷但係唔夠膽
其實有邊個係玩玩下咁去自殺呢，成日都有人覺得佢地無聊搵野黎搞，痴線

呢個世界唔係所有野都解決到
有時自殺的確係一種解脫

當然 有其他方法就更好
有啲自殺係一時諗唔開 可以避免
但有時自殺係深思熟慮後既決定
外人其實好難判斷 因為你唔係當事人 你唔會知佢受緊咩傷害 最憎啲人鬧自殺啲人點唔應該

Btw 幾時安落死合法化
自殺還自殺 自殺既人想死喳 其他人唔想 跳樓跳中其他人就真係
此回覆已被刪除

以前細個唔理解自殺者同情緒病人 成日覺得生命好寶貴 自己走去死好戇鳩
以前因為未接觸過抑鬱病人 記得佢有次同我傾訴
我竟然同佢講唔好轉牛角尖啦 你呢啲好小事姐 又話佢好小題大做等等
總之咩禁語都講晒出嚟 但當時嘅我真係唔係有心 我係完全唔識
好啦到大個終於自己都中招 好理解自殺者真係痛苦到要去死係咩一回事 好唏噓

我覺得生死係一個選擇

一個返唔到轉頭嘅抉擇

唔知啱唔啱

你一係要生存到最後一秒

一係永遠缺別呢個世界

我覺得
人已經無自由選擇岀唔岀世
咁起碼要有自由決定quit game

我唔係要吹奏自殺
但係如果一個人會選擇到行呢一步
佢承受緊既痛苦唔係我地可以想像到
建議樓主睇下Durkheim嘅自殺論，講得幾中

個社會迫出黎既，最可怕係大家都好似慣左咁，好冷漠


「哦，又有個學生跳樓啦」
此回覆已被刪除

跳還跳
唔好砸到人就得架喇

replies.msg:
上次水泉澳個仔真係可造之材
識揀啲一定砸唔到人既地方跳

有時有啲真係情緒好低落個陣先自殺，其實好多人之後都會後悔做咗傷害自己嘅事，或者好在自己冇做傻事
多數自殺嘅人都係因為跌得太低，覺得爬唔返上去先選擇呢條路，長期處於谷底個啲反而會適應

死咪死 人生都沒咩意義
唔通仲係到留黎比人玩？
自殺幾好 我都想
有時自殺並唔係自己選擇

quote.msg: 有時自殺並唔係自己選擇

replies.msg:
係架 比人逼上絕路 你有幾多希望都好
比人一玩弄 佢就係推你落去果個

唔想俾人送中,咪自殺

replies.msg:
自殺唔一定係"受害"先想自殺既

作為一個曾經覺得生存毫無意義,完全冇意欲做任何事,認真去搵各種自殺方法
訂咗個唔阻人,唔痛既自殺計劃嘅人
我覺得如果係冷靜思考過,又唔會阻到其他人嘅話,自殺都冇咩問題,係個人選擇

不過又唔少自殺係睇唔到其他出路,所以先揀自殺
如果有機會睇到其他出路嘅話可能就唔會揀自殺
可惜冇人可以完全體會到自己感受,自己亦唔會可以完全冷靜咁分析有冇其他出路
咁嘅情況係有啲可惜

事實上,大部分自殺都可以避免
關心下身邊既人
傾下計
有自殺念頭，但自己下一世可能做支那人/第三世界國家就打消咗

啲人成日唔明白你又要扮明，又話你有勇氣選擇死亡點解無勇氣活下去，屌你講得呢句就根本係唔撚明啦，扮咩明白呀！？
最憎人同我講『我明呀，你有咩同我講啦』
你係明嘢就同我收嗲咪咁多嘢講啦

唔係好辛苦點會自殺，香港個情況根本係他殺，就係因為社會冷漠咁先恐佈，記得睇過會自殺既人身前都會講過頂唔順等既說話，係求救信號黎，有幾多人真係關心過或者實際幫助過
利伸自己仲有抑鬱，同身邊既人講，困難咪又要自己挨自己解決
有時係其他人幫唔到我明，都係辛苦架啦
但大多數都係身邊無關心既人，諗起自己細個唔識表達，原來忍受過咁多，就覺得周圍無人可以相信，依家越來越孤僻
sorry 講野199 睇到咁多人自殺，我想講我明呀，如果你身邊有人需要幫忙，幫到就幫，因為有時個煩惱係大到令當事人睇唔到問題會解決個日，個無助感會壓到人吸唔到氣，想放棄重擦。無經歷過既人就怪當事人，明明佢地一出世就有父幹母幹或者生活係個相對好既環境，唔會明當事人有幾辛苦

真係痴撚線

自殺唔一定係"受害"先想自殺既

作為一個曾經覺得生存毫無意義,完全冇意欲做任何事,認真去搵各種自殺方法
訂咗個唔阻人,唔痛既自殺計劃嘅人
我覺得如果係冷靜思考過,又唔會阻到其他人嘅話,自殺都冇咩問題,係個人選擇

不過又唔少自殺係睇唔到其他出路,所以先揀自殺
如果有機會睇到其他出路嘅話可能就唔會揀自殺
可惜冇人可以完全體會到自己感受,自己亦唔會可以完全冷靜咁分析有冇其他出路
咁嘅情況係有啲可惜

通常呢個情況打乜熱線都冇用，最緊要身邊熟悉嘅朋友伸手幫一幫

replies.msg: 呢d垃圾熱線算柒數啦 打完仲想自殺
此回覆已被刪除
早登極樂
跌左落井
每日都想死

我自己覺得，做唔到自己想做既野，條命已經無用
除非生活得開心，如果唔開心，真係唔知為乜
世界無左我根本無損失
死有輕於鴻毛 重於泰山

自殺係對啲亂生仔嘅仆街父母最好報復，
等佢偷雞唔到蝕渣米，白頭人送黑頭人，臨老唔過得世，Total Lost。

環境突然轉變，返唔到轉頭
長期心理壓力大，諗唔到方法就會想死

但環境一直差開既，通常都習慣到就唔會諗死

有啲人我覺得佢地唔應該、未至於自殺
我會覺得佢地係情緒病，一時調節唔到
有情緒病既人都未必做到身體自主

其實都係個人選擇 盡量唔好影響到人咪得
e.g.唔好跳軌 尤其放工放學時段

如果有重病/癱左想死更加合理 唔明點解呢度無安樂死咁on9

咁唔夠 佢地做得出生仔等仔養已經代表佢地係自私

個仔死咗佢地都唔會真係傷心 只會諗 r 第二 d 野過世

如果少咗隻手隻腳呢 咁又唔同講法

報復就做多 d
同移民差唔多，留係香港既問題未解決，但唔再需要解決

遲早都要死架啦，唔想老死咪自殺囉。
同埋生仔，生個仔出黎即係生個會死既生命出黎咪即係會死。 個個生左以為盡左自己既使命咁撚樣。

replies.msg:
現今社會
唔係以人為本
係以錢為本
有生嘅權利沒有死嘅權利
沒有病嘅權利只有病死嘅權利


好多時因為上一代做錯好多決定
令下一代要捱
但有趣嘅係上一代永遠指責返下一代錯誤
好似嬰兒潮明明係上一代生太多
所以導致人口老化
但上一代就會睇作少子化
現今年輕人都唔生仔嘅
從未聽過老一輩認錯定咩


下一代背負更多
但得唔到基本體諒嘅時候就會覺得自己係一個“負累”
情緒就會好差
人係為快樂而生存
為避免痛苦而自殺


近日係連登見到戇鳩例子嘅係“被社會淘汰”嘅思想
如此赤裸裸演釋本未倒置，主隨客便嘅精神
最後希望大家明白，社會係為人服務，唔係為錢服務

現今社會
唔係以人為本
係以錢為本
有生嘅權利沒有死嘅權利
沒有病嘅權利只有病死嘅權利


好多時因為上一代做錯好多決定
令下一代要捱
但有趣嘅係上一代永遠指責返下一代錯誤
好似嬰兒潮明明係上一代生太多
所以導致人口老化
但上一代就會睇作少子化
現今年輕人都唔生仔嘅
從未聽過老一輩認錯定咩


下一代背負更多
但得唔到基本體諒嘅時候就會覺得自己係一個“負累”
情緒就會好差
人係為快樂而生存
為避免痛苦而自殺

如此赤裸裸演釋本未倒置，主隨客便嘅精神

It goes something like this.
小學:
"Thou shalt not kill."
"kay."
"Including yourself."
"cool."
"Thou shalt look at the world. Can't you see it's so beautiful? Why would people kill themselves where there are fairies and unicorns that fart rainbow, and honey rivers with candies growing on trees.... I mean yes there was this one time I got a little pissy and turn a man into a limbless caterpillar, and there's this one time I accidentally gave a man terminal cancer of all kinds .... I swear it was an accident! See they're still living well (sort of). The world is still a beautiful place!"
"errrr... okaaaay?"
初中:
"Who is me? I am but myself!"
Society: *imposes constraints*
"omg wtf you have no rights to do that omg i do wut i want fuck u"
高中:
"But don't you see Dave? This is all pointless, you can't convince them otherwise. Men all have different circumstances, different perceptions regarding things, the world, everything."
"But... I just can't... How could you give up on hope? Don't you still want happiness? Aren't we all doing just the same thing, seeking happiness? What will others think if they see you now... see you like this....? Oh god, what's the point to any of this....?"
*Stare outside the window, where all was peaceful, tranquil, the sunlight frolicking in the slow sway of shades*
"There's no point to anything, Dave. No point."
大學:
Durkheim: "It's all society's fault guys, fuck psychology lol"
Psychologists: "No it's not society you dumb fuck this blah blah blah study obviously says otherwise, we NEUROLOGISTS blah blah blah BRAIN FUNCTIONS blah blah blah CHEMICAL blah blah blah guys plz look at us we science now ;("
Sociologists: *something something poor statistical methods* "What suicide?"
Marx: >tfw some french bourgeois took you gig
>but...but muh alienation
>what do you mean we aren't all exploited?
依家:
"As I stood by the precipice, the sea roaring down below, an urge whispered in my ears. "You shall jump off. For what is a man's purpose if not to dissipate himself? Verily, life is but endless suffering. A suffering without purpose, a journey without reward. There will be no light awaiting you, nor the soothing caress of comfort. All shall be for nothing, and to nothing you shall return." As it speaks, the sea beckons, alluring to the bliss of sweet release. "To whom am I speaking to? This is but a pointless question, for I know you by nature. You are that who were born out of abandonment. To take revenge you usurped the place of the dead, and hailed yourself as the new idol." Responded the whisper "That you might be right. Yet I despised my worshippers, for they took my words for granted. They took my spites for decrees, venoms for potions, ruins for sanctuaries; so it is nothing they will get." As I heard those words, a tear slipped off my eye. "You spit such venom, yet much pain it carries! You yearn for their freedom, for they are not ready to carry themselves. Much weight is needed if one is to walk! Thus you bore yourself on them! Alas, if not you, your naysayers would be their lords. "Life is suffering," they would proclaim, "but there is much purpose to it, so that one shall endure, for life brings forth the abyss, so that none may triumph, for great suffering warrants great relief". To them I shall sing aloud the song of life! What is life, without death? Do you heed to the frock that prays to the goddess of yay? Or do you follow the frock that hurries to the grinder of nay? I say, have a will for yourself! If it is to grave, danced to it in a light-hearted tune! Thus I shall will my death, just as I will my life!"
"I have mistaken you for what you were, but now I see you are indeed, my kindred spirit! I shall carry your weight with me, so your yearning may not go in vain." Hearing as such, the whisper trembled with a joyful laugh, and off it goes to the roaring sea."

So that's pretty much what I think about suicide, in chronological order.

It goes something like this.
小學:
"Thou shalt not kill."
"kay."
"Including yourself."
"cool."
"Thou shalt look at the world. Can't you see it's so beautiful? Why would people kill themselves where there are fairies and unicorns that fart rainbow, and honey rivers with candies growing on trees.... I mean yes there was this one time I got a little pissy and turn a man into a limbless caterpillar, and there's this one time I accidentally gave a man terminal cancer of all kinds .... I swear it was an accident! See they're still living well (sort of). The world is still a beautiful place!"
"errrr... okaaaay?"
初中:
"Who is me? I am but myself!"
Society: *imposes constraints*
"omg wtf you have no rights to do that omg i do wut i want fuck u"
高中:
"But don't you see Dave? This is all pointless, you can't convince them otherwise. Men all have different circumstances, different perceptions regarding things, the world, everything."
"But... I just can't... How could you give up on hope? Don't you still want happiness? Aren't we all doing just the same thing, seeking happiness? What will others think if they see you now... see you like this....? Oh god, what's the point to any of this....?"
*Stare outside the window, where all was peaceful, tranquil, the sunlight frolicking in the slow sway of shades*
"There's no point to anything, Dave. No point."
大學:
Durkheim: "It's all society's fault guys, fuck psychology lol"
Psychologists: "No it's not society you dumb fuck this blah blah blah study obviously says otherwise, we NEUROLOGISTS blah blah blah BRAIN FUNCTIONS blah blah blah CHEMICAL blah blah blah guys plz look at us we science now ;("
Sociologists: *something something poor statistical methods* "What suicide?"
Marx: >tfw some french bourgeois took you gig
>but...but muh alienation
>what do you mean we aren't all exploited?
依家:
"As I stood by the precipice, the sea roaring down below, an urge whispered in my ears. "You shall jump off. For what is a man's purpose if not to dissipate himself? Verily, life is but endless suffering. A suffering without purpose, a journey without reward. There will be no light awaiting you, nor the soothing caress of comfort. All shall be for nothing, and to nothing you shall return." As it speaks, the sea beckons, alluring to the bliss of sweet release. "To whom am I speaking to? This is but a pointless question, for I know you by nature. You are that who were born out of abandonment. To take revenge you usurped the place of the dead, and hailed yourself as the new idol." Responded the whisper "That you might be right. Yet I despised my worshippers, for they took my words for granted. They took my spites for decrees, venoms for potions, ruins for sanctuaries; so it is nothing they will get." As I heard those words, a tear slipped off my eye. "You spit such venom, yet much pain it carries! You yearn for their freedom, for they are not ready to carry themselves. Much weight is needed if one is to walk! Thus you bore yourself on them! Alas, if not you, your naysayers would be their lords. "Life is suffering," they would proclaim, "but there is much purpose to it, so that one shall endure, for life brings forth the abyss, so that none may triumph, for great suffering warrants great relief". To them I shall sing aloud the song of life! What is life, without death? Do you heed to the frock that prays to the goddess of yay? Or do you follow the frock that hurries to the grinder of nay? I say, have a will for yourself! If it is to grave, danced to it in a light-hearted tune! Thus I shall will my death, just as I will my life!"
"I have mistaken you for what you were, but now I see you are indeed, my kindred spirit! I shall carry your weight with me, so your yearning may not go in vain." Hearing as such, the whisper trembled with a joyful laugh, and off it goes to the roaring sea."

So that's pretty much what I think about suicide, in chronological order.
